items.prompt: Before git push, a useful first check is…
items.explain: A clean (or intentional) tree avoids pushing half-finished work by accident.

items.prompt: If make test fails with TOOLS not set, you should first…
choices: Fix or source the environment / .env (TOOLS path)
items.explain: Env and Make must agree; missing TOOLS is an env checklist item.

items.prompt: check_ready.sh exiting non-zero when git status is dirty is intentional.
items.explain: Non-zero exit blocks a careless push until you commit or stash.

items.prompt: Prefer dry-run before a destructive clean because…
choices: You can see what would be removed before deleting
